mapper.select: select fd.id, fi.id as flight_id, fi.flight_number, fi.departure, fi.destination, fd.dish_id, d.name as dish_name, d.status as dish_status, c.name as category_name, 1 as dish_source, fd.cabin_type, fd.sort from flight_dish fd inner join flight_info fi on fi.id = fd.flight_id left join dish d on d.id = fd.dish_id left join category c on c.id = d.category_id where fi.flight_number = #{flightNumber} order by fd.sort asc, fd.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into flight_dish (flight_id, dish_id, cabin_type, sort) values (#{flightId}, #{dishId}, #{cabinType}, #{sort})
